commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a serial `unit-fast-fake-timers` Vitest project, routes fake-timer unit-fast targets into it, updates the core-unit-fast CI shard, and adds tests plus scoped test guidance.

PR surface: Tests +143, Other +16. Total +159 across 16 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, but I did not rerun the flaky shard in this read-only review. Current main runs all unit-fast files in an `isolate: false` project, and the PR body names the fake-timer leak plus former failing real-timer files.
